name: RIGHT ON Co., Ltd.
summary: RIGHT ON Co., Ltd. operates a chain of casual wear specialty stores in Japan. Its stores primarily offer jeans, as well as other casual wear products to male and female customers. The company also sells its products through online. As of August 20, 2018, it operated approximately 498 stores. RIGHT ON Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Tsukuba, Japan.
